allFeatures.name: Unarmored Defense
allFeatures.description: While you are wearing no armor and not wielding a shield, your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Wisdom modifier.

allFeatures.name: Martial Arts
allFeatures.description: At 1st level, your practice of martial arts gives you mastery of combat styles that use unarmed strikes and monk weapons.

allFeatures.name: Ki
allFeatures.description: Starting at 2nd level, your training allows you to harness the mystic energy of ki.

allFeatures.name: Unarmored Movement
allFeatures.description: Starting at 2nd level, your speed increases by 10 feet while you are not wearing armor or wielding a shield.

allFeatures.name: Monastic Tradition
allFeatures.description: When you reach 3rd level, you commit yourself to a monastic tradition.

allFeatures.name: Deflect Missiles
allFeatures.description: Starting at 3rd level, you can use your reaction to deflect or catch the missile when you are hit by a ranged weapon attack.

subclasses.name: Way of the Open Hand
subclasses.description: Monks of the Way of the Open Hand are the ultimate masters of martial arts combat, whether armed or unarmed.

features.name: Open Hand Technique
features.description: Whenever you hit a creature with one of the attacks granted by your Flurry of Blows, you can choose one effect: the target must succeed on a DEX save or be knocked prone; the target must make a STR save or be pushed up to 15 feet away; or the target can't take reactions until the end of your next turn.

features.name: Wholeness of Body
features.description: As an action, you can regain hit points equal to three times your monk level.

features.name: Tranquility
features.description: At the end of a long rest, you gain the effect of a Sanctuary spell (WIS save) that lasts until the start of your next long rest. The effect ends early if you make an attack or cast a spell that affects an enemy creature.

features.name: Quivering Palm
features.description: When you hit a creature with an unarmed strike, you can spend 3 ki points to start imperceptible vibrations. As an action later, the creature must make a CON save. On a failure, the creature is reduced to 0 hit points. On a success, the creature takes 10d10 necrotic damage.

subclasses.name: Way of Shadow
subclasses.description: Monks of the Way of Shadow follow a tradition that values stealth and subterfuge, sometimes called ninjas or shadowdancers.

features.name: Shadow Arts
features.description: You can spend 2 ki points to cast Darkness, Darkvision, Pass without Trace, or Silence. You also learn the Minor Illusion cantrip if you don't already know it.

features.name: Shadow Step
features.description: When you are in dim light or darkness, as a bonus action you can teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see that is also in dim light or darkness. You have advantage on the first melee attack you make before the end of the turn.

features.name: Cloak of Shadows
features.description: When you are in an area of dim light or darkness, you can use your action to become invisible. You remain invisible until you make an attack, cast a spell, or are in an area of bright light.

features.name: Opportunist
features.description: When a creature within 5 feet of you is hit by an attack made by a creature other than you, you can use your reaction to make a melee attack against that creature.

features: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
